---
title: "Slides"
---

Use this section for presentation-ready outputs connected to the report, the lab bundle, and the code companions.

## Available Decks

- [Matching and Weighting Training Deck](matching_methods_slides.qmd)
- [From Report to Labs: Background Lecture](pre_lab_background_lecture.qmd)
- [Delivering the Main Report in a 1-Hour Lab](main_report_1hr_lab_slides.qmd)

## Suggested Slide Pipeline

1. Keep deck narrative aligned with `report/matching_methods_report.qmd`.
2. Use the main report deck first, then the background lecture deck before opening the labs.
3. Use the 1-hour lab deck when you want a tighter facilitator-led session built around the teaching aid.
4. Pair the main report example with one lab extension at a time.
5. Link slides back to full-code, evaluated-code, and QA outputs so the deck stays auditable.
6. Export speaker-ready slides from Quarto RevealJS.
